chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET ELECTION APPELLATE TRIBUNAL SUKKUR. (BEFORE MR. JUSTICE IRSHAD ALI SHAH) Election Appeal No.S-35 of 2024 (Abdul Qadir Vs Federation of Pakistan & others) DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For Orders on CMA No. 74/2024 (Ex./A) 2. For hearing of main case. 09-01-2024. Mr. Sundar Khan Chachar, advocate for the appellant. Mr. Dareshani Ali Hyder “Ada” DAG, Pakistan. Mr. Zeeshan Haider Qureshi Assistant Director (Law) ECP. ******** 1. Deferred. 2. The appellant by way of instant election appeal has impugned the order of the Returning Officer whereby his nomination paper to contest election from NA-200 (Sukkur-I) has been rejected for the reason that he has failed to furnish the details of Bank account and Bank statement. As per learned counsel for the appellant the Bank account now has been opened. By doing so the appellant has remedied such omission, it was not substantial in nature, which could have disqualified him from contesting the election. As such the impugned order could not be sustained; consequently the nomination paper of the appellant shall be deemed to have been accepted. The instant Election Appeal is disposed of accordingly. Judge/Appellate Tribunal Nasim/P.A 2
